semantic.role: Stage-local task module that builds a dependency knowledge graph from the repository's tracked source files and runs structural diagnostics (cycles, dead code, hubs), saving the results as view data files for downstream views.
responsibilities: Construct a dependency graph from all tracked source files using the engine's buildGraph function.
Detect circular dependencies (cycles) in the graph and report them per module.
Detect dead code (modules with no incoming dependencies) and report the list of unused modules.
Detect hub modules (modules with an abnormally high number of incoming dependencies) and report them with their dependency counts.
Save the knowledge graph view data (knowledge-graph.json) via the output manager.
Save diagnostics data for cycles, dead code, and hubs as separate view data files.
Write health flags (e.g., derived from diagnostics severity) to the output.
Read index documents to obtain unit definitions needed for module identification.
Iterate over all tracked files from the scanner to build and analyze the graph.
Use the filesystem to ensure the output directory exists before writing view data.
outOfScope: Does not parse CLI arguments or dispatch commands.
Does not interact with LLM providers or manage credentials.
Does not modify source code files or create new files beyond view data.
Does not orchestrate other services or handle user prompts.
Does not perform any runtime execution scheduling or checkpointing.
invariants: Only imports from core contracts, engines, infra (index-reader), and types/protocol; no direct coupling to CLI or service layers.
Produces only view data output; no side effects on source code or database beyond saving view data.
Complete dependency on the scanner's tracked file list and index reader for unit definitions.
Task executes after scanning and before view derivation in the pipeline.

changeIntent.architecturalIntent: This task is a dedicated stage in the pipeline that augments the unit index with structural insights from dependency analysis. It converts raw dependency data into view-ready diagnostics and knowledge graph structures, reducing the complexity of downstream view derivation.
changeIntent.recentChangeIntent: Refactor to remove legacy CLI aliases, rebuild documentation, fix schema issues and tests. No direct changes to this file's logic or responsibilities.

publicSurface.description: Pipeline task that constructs a dependency knowledge graph, runs structural diagnostics, and saves the results as view data. Invoked by the task runtime after scanning, consumes tracked files and index documents, and produces knowledge-graph.json, cycle, dead-code, and hub diagnostics.
